name: Pineapple Bavarian Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the gelatin in cold water.
2. Beat the egg whites until stiff; set aside.
3. Beat the egg yolks slightly, add sugar and combine with hot milk. Cook in a double boiler until the mixture coats the spoon as for custard.
4. Dissolve the gelatin in the hot custard.
5. Cool, then fold in the whipped cream, egg whites, and lemon juice.
6. Line a mold with three grenadine pineapple rings and two creme de menthe pineapple rings, along with red cherries.
7. Fill the mold with the Bavarian cream mixture.
8. Chill for several hours until firm.
9. Turn off heat source and turn out on a platter.
10. For Christmas, garnish with holly. To unmold gelatin, dip quickly into hot water and invert onto a serving dish.
